arts.ttl: Norwich City keen on out-of-contract Arsenal forward
arts.sum: Norwich City are interested in signing Arsenal attacker Nathan Butler-Oyedeji, according to a report from Football Insider. Norwich… The post Norwich City keen on out-of-contract Arsenal forward appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Report: £17m Arsenal player could now be the first sale of the Andrea Berta era with Napoli keen to sign him
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to sell the Mikel Arteta signing ✅

arts.ttl: Sky Sports: Berta Working to Sign ‘World-Class’ Star for Arsenal With Gyokeres
arts.sum: Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta is working on a summer move for Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi.

arts.ttl: Kelly 'definitely smiling more' after Arsenal move
arts.sum: England winger Chloe Kelly finds she is "definitely smiling more" following her January move to Arsenal from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha to Arsenal transfer verdict - £60m concern, Alexander Isak point, Andrea Berta plan - Sam Truelove - football.london
arts.sum: I don't actually think Matheus Cunha is a player Arsenal need right now. £60million is a lot of money and with Arsenal also in the market for a wide forward, central midfielder and goalkeeper, they must get this signing right.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot on the lesson Liverpool can learn from Arsenal in the title race
arts.sum: Reds boss has highlighted where the Gunners are better than league leaders

arts.ttl: Report: £58m player had 'given his word' that he would join Man United but Andrea Berta wants him at Arsenal now
Arne Slot sends Liverpool Premier League title race message as Arsenal watch on
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has explained how his players are "refreshed" as the Premier League title race with Arsenal is set to resume. There are still nine matches left to play this season, including one which will see the Gunners go to Anfield in their third-from-last game of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice and Gabriel drop early Arsenal team news hints as Bukayo Saka return 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Declan Rice and Gabriel Magalhaes have each dropped an early team news hint ahead of Arsenal's match against Fulham. Nevertheless, Rice and Gabriel have previewed the Gunners' clash against Fulham on Instagram.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops 'big' Arsenal transfer hint amid Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyokeres links
arts.sum: The club's new sporting director Andrea Berta has been welcomed by Arteta, signalling an ambitious transfer window ahead for the Gunners. Despite falling short in the current title race, Arsenal are poised for significant investment in the market, eyeing a new centre forward and left winger, alongside a £51million move for Spanish midfielder Martin Zubimendi .
